description.value:
A jagged shard of black crystal the size of a fist, its surface cold and perfectly smooth despite its fractured shape. Light does not reflect from it — it absorbs it. In darkness, those nearby sometimes glimpse a faint violet shimmer at its core, visible only from the corner of the eye.

The shard radiates no detectable aura under normal divination. It does not register as magical until a true seeing or detect evil and good spell is cast within 10 feet of it.

Curse — Whisper of Vel'Nathis

Any creature that carries this shard on their person, or keeps it within 10 feet while sleeping, becomes subject to the attentions of the bound demon Vel'Nathis.

Each night during a long rest, the GM triggers the Whisper of Vel'Nathis activity. The sleeping creature must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be compelled to follow one of Vel'Nathis's demands, determined by rolling 1d10 on the Vel'Nathis Compulsion Table.

On a success, the character is aware of a presence in the dream but resists its pull. On three consecutive successes, Vel'Nathis withdraws until the shard changes hands.

The shard cannot be destroyed by nonmagical means. A dispel evil and good spell suppresses the curse for 24 hours. Only a banishment or imprisonment spell cast directly on the shard can seal Vel'Nathis permanently.

unidentified.name: Black Crystal Shard
unidentified.description: A jagged shard of black crystal, heavy for its size and cold to the touch. It does not warm in the hand. You find yourself reluctant to set it down, though you cannot say why.

activation.condition: Each night during a long rest while the shard is within 10 ft.

description.chatFlavor: Vel'Nathis stirs in the dark. DC 14 WIS save. On a failure, roll 1d10 on the Vel'Nathis Compulsion Table. Three consecutive successes drives Vel'Nathis into dormancy.

effects.name: CURSE: Vel'Nathis — Nightly Whisper
effects.description: Curse Active. The bearer must make a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw each night during a long rest while the shard is within 10 ft. On a failure, roll 1d10 on the Vel'Nathis Compulsion Table.
